copy.doorsIntro: Start here for the join path, ranks, leaders, and the shared culture that keeps Mōchirīī steady.
copy.spotlightIntro: Shoutout to this month's top guild member.
copy.galleryIntro: Screenshots from Mōchirīī runs, quiet wandering, and guild shenanigans.

descriptor: Mōchirīī is a cozy Where Winds Meet guild for players who want friendly company, relaxed events, helpful progression, and a softer place to land between adventures.
Join through Discord, read the joining path, and settle in at a humane pace. Come when able, drift when needed, and keep kindness in your words.

seal.title: Guild Seal
verse: Silvered jade softly gleams, where quiet petals fall,
Bamboo stands in patient grace, a guardian to all.
Hearts gather here in gentle light, unhurried, warm & true,
A seal of trust, of shared resolve, where kindred spirits grew.

bulletins.title: Monthly guild meeting open to all current members.
Monthly cosmetics raffle for active guild members.
Leadership positions currently open for applications.
